com.android.decode

枚举 BarcodeID

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Enum<BarcodeID>
      • com.android.decode.BarcodeID
  • 所有已实现的接口:
    java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Comparable<BarcodeID>

    public enum BarcodeID
extends java.lang.Enum<BarcodeID>
    BarcodeID is an enumeration class defining constants for different decoded barcode types.

    • 枚举常量概要

      枚举常量 
      枚举常量和说明
      AZTEC
      Aztec Code
      CODABAR
      Codabar
      CODE128
      Code 128
      CODE32
      Code 32
      CODE39
      Code 39
      CODE39_FULLASCII
      Code 39 Full ASCII
      CODE93
      Code 93
      COMPOSITE_CC_A
      GS1 Composite CC-A part, transmitted after EAN/UPC
      COMPOSITE_CC_B
      GS1 Composite CC-B part, transmitted after EAN/UPC
      COMPOSITE_GS1_128_A
      GS1 Composite GS1-128 with CC-A
      COMPOSITE_GS1_128_B
      GS1 Composite GS1-128 with CC-B
      COMPOSITE_GS1_128_C
      GS1 Composite GS1-128 with CC-C
      COMPOSITE_GS1_14_A
      GS1 Composite GS1 DataBar with CC-A
      COMPOSITE_GS1_14_B
      GS1 Composite GS1 DataBar with CC-B
      COMPOSITE_GS1_EXP_A
      GS1 Composite GS1 DataBar Expanded with CC-A
      COMPOSITE_GS1_EXP_B
      GS1 Composite GS1 DataBar Expanded with CC-B
      COMPOSITE_GS1_LIMIT_A
      GS1 Composite GS1 DataBar Limited with CC-A
      COMPOSITE_GS1_LIMIT_B
      GS1 Composite GS1 DataBar Limited with CC-B
      DATAMATRIX
      Data Matrix
      DISCRETE25
      Discrete 2/5
      DOTCODE
      DotCode
      EAN13
      EAN-13
      EAN13_ADDON2
      EAN-13 + 2
      EAN13_ADDON5
      EAN-13 + 5
      EAN13_ISBN
      ISBN (ISBN-10 & ISBN-13)
      EAN13_ISSN
      ISSN
      EAN8
      EAN-8
      EAN8_ADDON2
      EAN-8 + 2
      EAN8_ADDON5
      EAN-8 + 5
      GS1_128
      GS1-128
      GS1_14
      GS1 Databar-14
      GS1_EXP
      GS1 Databar Expanded
      GS1_LIMIT
      GS1 Databar Limited
      HANXIN
      HANXIN
      INTERLEAVED25
      Interleaved 2/5
      ISBT_128
      ISBT 128
      ISBT_128_CONCATENATED
      ISBT 128 Concatenated
      MATRIX25
      Matrix 2/5
      MAXICODE
      Maxicode
      MICRO_QR
      Micro QR Code
      MICROPDF417
      MicroPDF417
      MSI
      MSI
      NOT_DEFINED
      The decoded data is not recognized
      PDF417
      PDF-417.
      POSTAL_4STATE
      Postal USPS 4-State
      POSTAL_AUSTRALIAN
      Postal Australian
      POSTAL_JAPAN
      Postal Japan
      POSTAL_KIX
      Postal Kix
      POSTAL_PLANET
      Postal Planet
      POSTAL_POSTNET
      Postal Postnet
      POSTAL_ROYALMAIL
      Postal Royal Mail
      QRCODE
      QR Code
      TRIOPTIC
      Trioptic
      UPCA
      UPC-A
      UPCA_ADDON2
      UPC-A + 2
      UPCA_ADDON5
      UPC-A + 5
      UPCE
      UPC-E
      UPCE_ADDON2
      UPC-E + 2
      UPCE_ADDON5
      UPC-E + 5
      UPCE1
      UPC-E1
      UPCE1_ADDON2
      UPC-E1 + 2
      UPCE1_ADDON5
      UPC-E1 + 5

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 静态方法 实例方法 具体方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      static BarcodeID fromOrdinal(int n)
      From the ordered enum to BarcodeID.
      int getLength1ID()
      Retrieves the corresponding Lenght1 PropertyID number associated.
      int getLength2ID()
      Retrieves the corresponding Lenght2 PropertyID number associated.
      int getLengthModeID()
      Retrieves the corresponding Length Control Mode PropertyID number associated.
      java.lang.String toString()
      Retrieves the corresponding name associated.
      static BarcodeID valueOf(java.lang.String name)
      返回带有指定名称的该类型的枚举常量。
      static BarcodeID[] values()
      按照声明该枚举类型的常量的顺序, 返回 包含这些常量的数组。

    • 方法详细资料

      • values

        public static BarcodeID[] values()
        按照声明该枚举类型的常量的顺序, 返回 包含这些常量的数组。该方法可用于迭代 常量, 如下所示: 
        for (BarcodeID c : BarcodeID.values())
    System.out.println(c);
        返回:
        按照声明该枚举类型的常量的顺序返回的包含这些常量的数组

      • valueOf

        public static BarcodeID valueOf(java.lang.String name)
        返回带有指定名称的该类型的枚举常量。 字符串必须与用于声明该类型的枚举常量的 标识符完全匹配。(不允许有多余 的空格字符。)
        参数:
        name - 要返回的枚举常量的名称。
        返回:
        返回带有指定名称的枚举常量
        抛出:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - 如果该枚举类型没有带有指定名称的常量
        java.lang.NullPointerException - 如果参数为空值

      • fromOrdinal

        public static BarcodeID fromOrdinal(int n)
        From the ordered enum to BarcodeID.
        参数:
        n - int
        返回:
        Symbology the corresponding one.

      • getLength1ID

        public int getLength1ID()
        Retrieves the corresponding Lenght1 PropertyID number associated.
        返回:
        int representing a PropertyID value.

      • getLength2ID

        public int getLength2ID()
        Retrieves the corresponding Lenght2 PropertyID number associated.
        返回:
        int representing a PropertyID value.

      • getLengthModeID

        public int getLengthModeID()
        Retrieves the corresponding Length Control Mode PropertyID number associated.
        返回:
        int representing a PropertyID value.

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        Retrieves the corresponding name associated.
        覆盖:
        toString 在类中 java.lang.Enum<BarcodeID>
        返回:
        String representing the name.
